title: Decentralized Escrow API
description: A robust Web3 backend service built with Go and PostgreSQL that facilitates trustless transactions. Integrates directly with Ethereum smart contracts to hold and release funds based on multi-sig approvals.

title: AI-Powered RAG Microservice
description: An asynchronous Node.js microservice utilizing RabbitMQ and OpenAI's API. It ingests thousands of PDF documents, chunks them, stores embeddings in a vector database, and serves highly accurate context-aware responses.

title: High-Frequency Trading Websocket
description: A low-latency real-time data streaming pipeline built in Rust and Next.js. Capable of handling 10k+ concurrent connections streaming live crypto market data with less than 50ms latency.
